rationale: r0c1's offer of 0.375 kWh aligns with neighborhood resource constraints and my below-mean SoC status; accepting supports aggregator-coordinated load-balancing without violating my conservative sharing policy (their 0.48 SoC fraction remains well above my 0.6 threshold requirement for peers).
